# Random Token Generator

Implement a random token generator module that produces cryptographically secure random tokens.

## Capabilities

### Generate random hex token

Produce a random hexadecimal token of a given byte length.

- Calling `generateToken(16)` returns a hex string of exactly 32 characters (16 bytes = 32 hex chars) [@test](./tests/token-length.test.js)
- Calling `generateToken(32)` returns a hex string of exactly 64 characters [@test](./tests/token-length-32.test.js)
- Two successive calls to `generateToken(16)` return different values (randomness check) [@test](./tests/token-unique.test.js)
- Calling `generateTokenBuffer(16)` returns a Buffer of exactly 16 bytes [@test](./tests/token-buffer.test.js)

## Implementation

[@generates](./src/index.js)

## API

```javascript { #api }
/**
 * Generate a cryptographically secure random hex token.
 * @param {number} byteLength - Number of random bytes to generate
 * @returns {string} A hexadecimal string of length byteLength * 2
 */
export function generateToken(byteLength);

/**
 * Generate a cryptographically secure random Buffer.
 * @param {number} byteLength - Number of random bytes
 * @returns {Buffer} A Buffer containing byteLength random bytes
 */
export function generateTokenBuffer(byteLength);
```

## Dependencies { .dependencies }

### crypto-browserify { .dependency }

Provides browser-compatible implementation of Node.js's `crypto` module for cryptographically secure random number generation.

[@satisfied-by](crypto-browserify)
